candidate.completion: unsubscribe from your situationship and try eye contact.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please unsubscribe from your situationship and try eye contact.

evaluation.rationale: There is a recognizable social observation here, but the turn is more advisory than revelatory. "Unsubscribe from your situationship" has some novelty, yet the pivot is bulky and the sentence does not resolve into a crisp, quotable reversal.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
